notes:
Game starts and you are able to navigate the main menu. However once you click "New game" it will show the campaign screen for 1 second before throwing you back to the main menu. 

Videos (Cutscenes etc..) don't work due to the .wmv file issue.
title: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2

notes: same problems as described, videos are not played, you get kicked back to the main menu after a second root cause is easyanticheat campaign & battle can be started: add "-noeac" to launcher, for campaign -> new campaign -> click does not work, but holding spacebar does for skipping the broken videos and starting the campaign as well doing this disables online play
title: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2

notes:
Game launches into the main menu, but without adding '-noeac' to the launch options it just goes back to the main menu after a second or two. '-noeac' disables Easy Anti-Cheat so multiplayer is disabled, leaving only campaign. I haven't tried coop yet.

Videos don't work but I can skip them with space bar. Also, when I quit the game the process doesn't stop properly so I have to manually kill it to be able to start the game again.

Performance is pretty good. It ran very stably at just above 60fps all the time on Epic graphics settings while playing. Even during in-game cutscenes with more things on the screen than while playing regularly the fps only intermittently dropped to about 55 fps. There's no video or audio artifacts and no noticeable input lag.
title: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2

notes: Game runs with -noeac. Videos don't play but game is entirely playable. Of course multiplayer doesn't work with EAC disabled. Performance on MESA is great. If you are an AMDVLK user the game is also playable but the performance tanks when looking at planets which also don't render correctly.
title: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2

notes:
Tried running the game through Proton 4.11-2, as the game was free to play this weekend. The game started (no intro or cinematics however) and loaded the main screen. I was able to enter the options menu, load menu and such. However, when selecting the "new campaign"  or "battle" option, it freezes on the selection screen and jumps back to the main screen. So the game itself is, as of this moment, unplayable.

And yes, I tried entering different video settings in the menu. But that didn't work, and I do not believe it is actually a video issue with my current setup being what it is.
title: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2

notes: Doesn't boot into any game. Can't play with my friend.
title: Battlefleet Gothic: Armada 2
